title: Crunchy Mars Bars Korean Delight
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert made with Mars bars, a perfect fusion of flavors and textures.
instructions: Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add the Korean chili flakes and stir for 1 minute.
Add the crunchy rice cereal and stir until well combined.
Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
Cut the Mars bars into small pieces and add to the saucepan.
Mix until the Mars bars are evenly coated with the cereal mixture.
Press the mixture into a lined or greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Enjoy your Crunchy Mars Bars Korean Delight!
